issue.title: hdtoday.cc

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://hdtoday.cc/watch-tv/watch-the-blacklist-full-39519.4853584](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhdtoday.cc%2Fwatch-tv%2Fwatch-the-blacklist-full-39519.4853584) ### Comment > with adgaurd enabled, video can't play. when I disable it I faces lots of annoying pop-ups and ads but im also able to play video. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/qvzo10p7x1wsw4cwc8kogsgwcks0s00pi4m49ifje8.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/c07yzwrz548o8kowcsk800wwgcwwcck718sjfk4cg4.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Mini for Mac v2.1.4.1010 System version: | `MacOS 26.3.1 (Build 25D2128)` Browser: | Safari License type: | free Advanced rules: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter Filters last update: | 2026-04-20-1-25-18 AM Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled
